subject: [RFC PATCH 30/40] mm: show_mem: collect migratetype letters from per-superpageblock lists

2026-05-20.patch_summary: This patch updates the show_mem function to correctly display migratetype letters for each order in a zone. After the superpage block (SPB) rework, free pages are stored on per-superpageblock lists instead of zone-level free_area lists. The patch iterates over each SPB in the zone and checks if any migratetypes have free pages at that order. If all migratetypes have been seen, it exits early. The patch also handles zones whose SPB array has not yet been allocated by falling back to the zone-level free_area. This change ensures that the migratetype letters are accurately displayed in the show_mem output.
